entities.name: Data Engineering
entities.summary: Cloud data platforms and high-throughput real-time streaming architectures.
entities.description: Modern data warehousing, real-time pipeline construction, ETL orchestrations, and analytics foundation models engineered to lock in AI readiness.

overview.summary: Cloud data platforms and high-throughput real-time streaming architectures.
overview.description: Modern data warehousing, real-time pipeline construction, ETL orchestrations, and analytics foundation models engineered to lock in AI readiness.

how_it_works.process: Builds secure cloud data platforms and pipelines using standard ETL/ELT practices to prepare data for real-time AI ingestion.
steps: ETL/ELT orchestration setup via dbt and Airflow

features: Automated ETL orchestration structures (dbt, Apache Airflow)
benefits: Optimize analytical warehouse queries by up to 40%
Ensure data pipeline ingestion latency below 5 seconds

faq.question: Which cloud warehouses do you support?
faq.answer: BigQuery, Snowflake, and Redshift are fully supported.

entities.name: Enterprise & Agentic AI
entities.summary: Autonomous task coordination agents and custom model adaptation pipelines.
entities.description: Development of customized large language model pipelines, local offline LLM optimization setups, vector index adapters, and multi-agent autonomous orchestrations.

overview.summary: Autonomous task coordination agents and custom model adaptation pipelines.
overview.description: Development of customized large language model pipelines, local offline LLM optimization setups, vector index adapters, and multi-agent autonomous orchestrations.

how_it_works.process: Creates autonomous agent graphs and optimized RAG indexes to automate complex multi-step data tasks.
steps: Retrieval augmented generation setup with high-precision indexes

features: Custom fine-tuning and supervised reinforcement training pipelines
benefits: Automate multi-step data analysis workflows from hours to seconds
Achieve verified accuracy targets for internal information retrieval

faq.question: How do you guarantee agent safety?
faq.answer: By using deterministic guardrail layers and strict category bounds check rules.

faq.question: How long does a roadmap assessment take?
faq.answer: Typically 4 to 8 weeks depending on organizational complexity.
